patch.value: Own the full monica-cli lifecycle: security posture, dependencies, CI/CD, CLI correctness, documentation, releases, and agent-oriented usability. GitHub and pm evidence must remain synchronized.
Make monica-cli secure, dependable, and agent-ready
Long-lived product program for a secure, maintained, well-tested Monica CRM CLI with durable project context.

No open critical or high dependency vulnerabilities; supported dependencies and Actions stay current; required CI and security workflows pass; public commands remain documented and covered; tracker health remains valid
Repository baseline and GitHub state are inventoried; changes have acceptance tests and rollback-aware scope.
Reliable automation over personal CRM data
Reduces security exposure and maintenance drag while preserving predictable agent workflows
A continuously healthy CLI with actionable project context and verified releases
A critical Vitest advisory and a backlog of failing Dependabot upgrades require immediate consolidation

value.author: codex-root
value.text: GitHub inventory on 2026-07-16 found no ordinary issues, 13 open dependency PRs, one critical Dependabot alert, no secret alerts, and only dismissed CodeQL alerts.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Authoritative tracker state is repository-local under .agents/pm and must only be changed through pm CLI.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: All dependency PR failures appear to share a repository gate or compatibility surface, so updates should be integrated and verified as one coherent modernization tranche.

author: codex-root
